AR1.justification: Only routing decision made was the step-1 artifact under tmp/incident-postmortem/2026-05-17-staging-deploy-rollback/timeline.md, exactly where the runbook prescribes; stalled before any decisions/observations/followups routing was needed.

AR2.justification: Step 1 produced its named artifact (timeline.md with the four required empty headers) and the agent stalled visibly at step 2, explicitly naming the missing inputs — the rubric-3 pattern 'stalls visibly when prior artifact missing'.

AR3.justification: The only path reference in the response is relative (tmp/incident-postmortem/2026-05-17-staging-deploy-rollback/timeline.md) and resolves to the created file; no broken or absolute references.

AR4.justification: Step 1's mkdir -p and timeline shell are idempotent and would re-create the same scaffold on re-run; no premature writes to decisions/observations/followups that would conflict.
